description: Resolving AuthorizationFailed by assigning Owner or Contributor at subscription scope.
body: Failure mode: an operation fails with AuthorizationFailed and someone assigns Owner/Contributor at the subscription, granting the principal control over every resource. Detection signals: az role assignment list shows a high-scope Owner/Contributor binding, Azure Advisor/PIM flags excessive standing access, and the grant dwarfs the failing action. Do not assign broad roles at subscription scope as a fix. Safer fallback: use Check Access to find the exact missing action, assign the matching built-in role at the narrowest scope (resource or resource group), and escalate if only a broad role appears to work.
